inputs.label: Contract Value
inputs.businessContext: Total contract amount agreed with client. Based on standard construction contract practices.

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of roofing materials (shingles, underlayment, etc.). Referenced from RSMeans construction cost data.

inputs.label: Labor Cost
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor cost for installation. Based on prevailing wage rates and crew size.

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs as percentage of direct costs. Typical range 10-20% for roofing contractors.

inputs.label: Contingency Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Buffer for unforeseen costs. Industry standard 5-15%.

inputs.label: Target Margin
inputs.businessContext: Desired profit margin. Typical target 15-25% for roofing contracts.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in cost estimates. Low = rough estimate, High = detailed takeoff.

inputs.label: Roof Area
inputs.businessContext: Total roof surface area. Used for unit cost calculations.

inputs.label: Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Roof complexity (pitch, penetrations, etc.). Low = simple gable, High = multiple hips/valleys.

thresholds.marginPercent < 10: Warning: Margin below 10% - high risk of loss
thresholds.contingencyPercent > 20: Warning: High contingency indicates poor cost estimation

hiddenLossDrivers: if marginPercent < marginTarget then 'Margin below target'
suggestedActions: if marginPercent < marginTarget then 'Review material and labor costs for savings opportunities'
if contingencyPercent > 20 then 'Improve cost estimation accuracy'
if complexityFactor == 'high' then 'Consider value engineering to reduce complexity'
